title: senecio rivularis
intro: Senecio rivularis, also known as River Bush Senecio, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in South Africa, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural anti-histamine. The health benefits of Senecio rivularis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of allergies, asthma, and other respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Senecio rivularis is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can also be infused in hot water or used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
